# VoiceAI

> Human-like AI phone agents for customer care, sales, and support — multilingual, 24/7, and connected to your knowledge base.

VoiceAI deploys realistic AI voice agents ("Alex") that handle customer calls in 30+ languages, draw answers from your uploaded knowledge base, and integrate with telephony providers like Africa's Talking and Briq.

## Pages

- [Home](/): product overview, how it works, integrations, and trusted partners.
- [Pricing](/pricing): plan tiers and what's included at each level.

## Docs

- [Developer Documentation](/docs): REST API reference covering authentication, placing voice calls, managing the knowledge base, webhooks, and error codes.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml)
